ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "cds_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the school */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the school is located */,
  "district" TEXT /* School district the school is part of */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, charter) */,
  "sector_type" TEXT /* Sector type (e.g., public, private) */,
  "charter" TEXT /* Indicates if the school is a charter school */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the principal */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "special_school_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the school has special status (e.g., state special school) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the counties table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cds_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type FOREIGN KEY ("school_type") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_sector_type FOREIGN KEY ("sector_type") REFERENCES sector_types ("sector_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "county" TEXT /* County in which the district is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for district inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the district office */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the district */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the district's website */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent */,
  "superintendent_email" TEXT /* Email of the superintendent */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the district was founded */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the counties table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the state table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "min_grade" INTEGER /* Minimum grade level the school type caters to */,
  "max_grade" INTEGER /* Maximum grade level the school type caters to */,
  "is_special_education" INTEGER /* Indicates if the school type is for special education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_types" (
  "sector_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector type */,
  "sector_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector type (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector type */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "is_nonprofit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sector type is nonprofit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charter_schools" (
  "charter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charter record */,
  "school_id" TEXT /* CDS code of the school it relates to */,
  "charter_status" TEXT /* Indicates if the school is chartered or not */,
  "charter_authorizer" TEXT /* Entity that authorized the charter */,
  "charter_term" INTEGER /* Length of the charter term in years */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date of the next charter renewal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charter_schools_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("cds_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operational status */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is the default status for new schools */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "cds_code" TEXT /* CDS code of the school being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cds_code FOREIGN KEY ("cds_code") REFERENCES schools ("cds_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
